title: Tomato Pack
description:
A pack thats created by an ordinary minecraft player 


some of the textures used in the pack has been gotten from other packs

srry to all of them for taking their textures
body:
A pack thats created by an ordinary minecraft player 

features

-non fire
-smaller swords
-golden tomato
-smaller totems
-low shields
-beter grass

and more

!IMPORTANT!
if you want to use this texture pack whit apple skin use the mod in this link or it wont be compatible:[https://www.mediafire.com/file/pti2ik9j2x2e4y4/appleskin-fabric-mc1.21-3.0.6_-_Kopya.jar/file](https://www.mediafire.com/file/pti2ik9j2x2e4y4/appleskin-fabric-mc1.21-3.0.6_-_Kopya.jar/file)
